)

samples.prediction:
SELECT s.CharterNum, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) as AvgWritingScore
FROM satscores ss
JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.CharterNum
ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC;
samples.expected: SELECT CharterNum, AvgScrWrite, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY AvgScrWrite DESC) AS WritingScoreRank FROM schools AS T1  INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T2.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND CharterNum is not null
samples.raw_output:
SELECT s.CharterNum, AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) as AvgWritingScore
FROM satscores ss
JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode
WHERE ss.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND s.CharterNum IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY s.CharterNum
ORDER BY AvgWritingScore DESC;

samples.prediction:
SELECT
    SUM(t.Amount) AS total_amount_spent,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y%m', t.Date) = '201201' THEN t.Amount ELSE 0 END) AS amount_spent_jan_2012
FROM
    transactions_1k t
JOIN
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE
    t.CustomerID = 38508;

    SUM(t.Amount) AS total_amount_spent,

    transactions_1k t
JOIN
